name: Poormans Shake n Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large ZipLoc bag.
2. Use the mixture to coat any type of meat.
3. Store the mixture in the freezer for future use.
Note: Feel free to adjust the amount of cayenne and chili powder according to your preference. The coating can be customized with whatever ingredients you have on hand, making it a versatile option for various meats.
